metadata.description: A collection of GitHub Copilot plugins for cinematic video generation and AI-powered creative workflows

plugins.name: author
plugins.description: Generate cinematic video descriptions and storyboards, and call Azure OpenAI Sora-2 to produce videos.

plugins.name: copilot-admin
plugins.description: Query GitHub Copilot license allocation and billing costs for Organizations and Enterprises.

plugins.name: plugin-creator
plugins.description: Scaffold new GitHub Copilot Plugins with correct directory structure, plugin metadata, SKILL.md, README, and optional Python scripts.
